question: Does the room placard at the top read exactly 'B-417'?
Is the 'B-417' text displayed in white on a blue background, maintaining the original font size and style?
Does line 3 of the 'LAB ENTRY REQUIREMENTS' list now read '3. All Visitors Must Register at Front Desk'?
Has the line 'No Eating or Drinking Inside' been renumbered to 4?
Has the line 'Please Close Door When Leaving' been renumbered to 5?
Is the vertical spacing between all five lines in the requirement list uniform?
Are the numbers 1 through 5 in the requirement list vertically aligned?
Does the black sticker above the card reader read exactly 'TAP TO ACCESS'?
Is the text 'TAP TO ACCESS' centered on the black sticker and displayed in white?
Are lines 1 ('Unauthorized Personnel Prohibited') and 2 ('Mask Required Upon Entry') preserved with their original numbering?
Are the worn/aged edges of the black sticker above the card reader preserved?
Is the header 'LAB ENTRY REQUIREMENTS' and the footer 'Emergency: 555-0199' unchanged?
Is the circular 'Doorbell' sticker on the left unchanged?
Is the green 'EXIT' sign with the arrow unchanged?
Are the door handle and card reader hardware unchanged in shape and position?
Are all text additions ('B-417', list item 3, 'TAP TO ACCESS') legible and free of spelling errors?
Is the sandblasted metal texture of the door consistent, without visible seams or smoothing around the edited areas?
Is the image free of visible AI artifacts, blurring, or smudging, especially around the text edits?
